allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', pkg.dependencies?.next || pkg.devDependencies?.next\); console.log\('ai:', pkg.dependencies?.ai || pkg.devDependencies?.ai\);")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(pkg.vitest || pkg['vitest'], null, 2\)\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.scripts, null, 2\)\);")
